name: Cancel an order - Coinbase Developer Documentation

name: Cancellation and Refund API - Meta for Developers
snippet: Orders can be canceled after they are moved out of the FB_PROCESSING state, with an exception of orders in the FB_PROCESSING state for more than 24 hours.
